---
title: "Publications"
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 1
  image-height: 150px
  fields: [title, author, description, image, date]
---

<style>
/* Custom styling to match Masiello Entry 67 */
.quarto-listing-container-grid .g-col-1 {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #eee;
  padding-bottom: 2rem;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}

.listing-item .card-body {
  order: 1;
  flex: 1;
  padding-right: 20px;
}

.listing-item .card-img-top {
  order: 2;
  flex: 0 0 300px; /* Adjust width of the TOC image here */
  height: auto;
}

.listing-item .card {
  border: none;
}
</style>
